Build a library of articles. Each time you save the SNU leaderboard, the spotlight automatically advances to the next article in the queue. You can also manually pick which article shows now.

Paste URL first, then click Pre-fill to auto-populate the title field. Fill in the rest manually.

Assistant

Use the Agent Assistant GPT for help with Excel macros, AgencyBloc workflows, onboarding, reporting, underwriting assistance, carrier-specific questions, and internal operations support.

Open Agent Assistant ↗ Open AgencyBloc

Starter Prompt

✓ Copied

Paste into Agent Assistant to start with the right context every time.

📋 Medicare SEP Rules — AARP Reference
⚠ 2025 Update: Dual/LIS SEP changed from quarterly to monthly
Special Enrollment Periods allow beneficiaries to make Medicare plan changes outside of the Annual Enrollment Period when qualifying life events occur.
My Medi
Internal resource center for agent tools, libraries, and planning calculators.
© 2025 My Medi

⚠ Agent Use Only  ·  This hub is intended for licensed insurance agent use only. All information, tools, and resources provided should be independently validated by the agent before use with clients. The Agent Assistant AI tool is provided for general assistance and guidance purposes only — responses are not guaranteed to be 100% accurate, complete, or current. Agents are solely responsible for verifying information and ensuring compliance with applicable laws, carrier guidelines, and CMS regulations.

AI
